title: MRD Resistance Geometry Intelligence Audit Results v0

overall_result.summary: All six audit items have pass statuses for research-map continuation only. The next axis revision may proceed if it keeps measurement trajectory, residual biological state, clone architecture, and clone-state coupling separate; labels clone-state coupling as source-specific and provisional; preserves contradiction-mining tasks; and does not introduce clinical guidance or claim upgrades.

audit_item_results.result_summary: The current artifacts separate source-specific NGS MRD trajectory, flow MRD context, and single-cell residual-state biology. No axis revision should merge measurement trajectory with residual biological state.
evidence_basis: martinez-lopez-2020-mrd-dynamics-geometry-v0 preserves NGS MRD assay, threshold, specimen, serial timing, and source-defined trajectory labels.
cui-2024-mrd-clonal-evolution-geometry-v0 preserves single-cell RNA sequencing, next-generation flow MRD context, paired sample timing, and MRD-positive/MRD-negative contexts.

cohen-2021-resistance-single-cell-geometry-v0 preserves single-cell transcriptional state, therapy exposure, and sampling time point as a biological-state layer separate from MRD measurement trajectory.
required_guardrails: Axis revision must keep measurement trajectory and residual biological state as separate fields.
Every cross-source comparison must carry assay method, specimen, threshold or sensitivity context when available, sampling time, cohort context, and non-advice boundary.
MRD trajectory labels must not become patient-specific interpretation.
blocked_inferences: No relapse forecast from trajectory labels.

audit_item_results.result_summary: Clone-state coupling can remain as an explicit research-map edge only if it is named as source-specific and provisional. Current artifacts do not support causal ranking or clinical actionability.
evidence_basis: cui-2024-mrd-clonal-evolution-geometry-v0 links genetic clone architecture and transcriptional dynamics but limits cross-study comparability.
cohen-2021-resistance-single-cell-geometry-v0 supports a narrow clone-identity-to-transcriptional-state coupling slice while keeping clone identity and transcriptional state separate.
li-2025-single-cell-myeloma-geometry-v0 keeps subclone diversity as review-level context and not a cohort-level measurement.
required_guardrails: Axis revision must label clone-state coupling as source-specific and provisional.
Clone identity, clone architecture, transcriptional state, therapy exposure, and sampling time point must remain separate fields.
Subclone diversity remains a separate under-covered branch until second-source extraction matures it.

audit_item_results.result_summary: The current artifacts keep metabolic, NF-kB, hypoxia, protein-folding, and mitochondrial-respiration signals as research-map signals. The axis revision must not convert pathway-state observations into intervention, target, supplement, monitoring, or treatment language.
evidence_basis: cui-2024-mrd-clonal-evolution-geometry-v0 limits fatty-acid oxidation and NF-kB signals to source-specific research extraction.
cohen-2021-resistance-single-cell-geometry-v0 limits hypoxia tolerance, protein-folding, and mitochondrial-respiration signals to source-specific resistant-state extraction.
mrd-resistance-geometry-second-source-task-queue-v0 keeps metabolic and NF-kB second-source tasks visible instead of upgrading pathway claims.
required_guardrails: Axis revision must keep pathway nodes as descriptive research signals only.
Metabolic and NF-kB branches must remain under-covered until second-source extraction is complete.
Any pathway language that sounds actionable must be weakened or moved to a gap.
blocked_inferences: No supplement or metabolic intervention suggestion.
No monitoring rule from pathway-state labels.

audit_item_results.result_summary: Coverage counts remain artifact-readiness metrics. The current coverage and task-queue language does not rank mechanisms by evidence strength, biological importance, frequency, or clinical readiness.
evidence_basis: mrd-resistance-geometry-coverage-v0 labels coverage as public artifact coverage.
mrd-resistance-geometry-second-source-task-queue-v0 keeps under-covered buckets visible as extraction tasks.
The audit packet blocks mechanism ranking from covered-for-v0-navigation status.
required_guardrails: Axis revision must not sort, rank, or prioritize mechanisms from coverage counts.
Covered-for-v0-navigation must mean only enough artifact coverage for internal map navigation.
Under-covered buckets must not be described as less biologically important.

audit_item_results.result_summary: The contradiction-mining requirement is satisfied by a dedicated task queue. Axis revision can proceed only if these contradiction tasks remain linked as unresolved follow-up work, not as completed counterevidence review.
evidence_basis: mrd-resistance-geometry-contradiction-mining-task-queue-v0 defines contradiction-search tasks for MRD trajectory, residual biological state, clone-state coupling, tumor microenvironment shelter, and pathway actionability.
Each task preserves source, assay, cohort, therapy, timing, and boundary mismatch checks.
No task asks for external human outreach.
required_guardrails: Axis revision must cite the contradiction-mining queue as unresolved follow-up.
No edge may be upgraded beyond source-bounded v0 navigation before contradiction mining matures.
Any contradiction found later must split, weaken, or block the affected edge.
blocked_inferences: No claim that contradiction search is complete.

audit_item_results.result_summary: The reviewed artifacts preserve research-use-only boundaries and do not introduce prognosis, treatment selection, monitoring guidance, trial guidance, patient-specific interpretation, or cure claims.
evidence_basis: All target artifacts state research-use-only or equivalent nonclinical boundaries.
Source extraction records include explicit what-this-does-not-support sections.
The audit packet and results both set human outreach policy to none and internal audit status to not clinical validation.
required_guardrails: Axis revision must keep not-medical-advice, not-diagnostic, not-treatment, not-monitoring, not-trial, and not-cure boundaries.
The phrase cure-oriented may describe research direction only; it must not claim cure.
No-human-outreach mode must not reduce uncertainty language.

axis_revision_constraints: Keep four explicit structures: measurement trajectory, residual biological state, clone architecture, and clone-state coupling edges.
Make clone-state coupling provisional and source-specific.
Do not rank mechanisms, pathways, therapies, assays, sources, or tasks.
Keep metabolic and NF-kB pathway branches under-covered until second-source extraction is added.
Link the contradiction-mining queue as unresolved follow-up.
Do not introduce cure, prognosis, diagnosis, treatment, monitoring, trial, or patient-specific claims.
remaining_follow_on_work: Run contradiction-mining tasks before any claim upgrade.
Continue second-source extraction for under-covered branches.

review_notes: Audit results are based on existing source-specific extraction records and the Phase 3 audit packet.
Results do not upgrade any scientific or clinical claim.
Contradiction mining is routed to a task queue instead of external human outreach.
